summary: Feed Health Monitor feature fully tested. Backend: 6/7 tests passed (1 transient 502 error). Frontend: All Playwright checks passed. The monitor correctly distinguishes between technical failures (DEAD/STALE) and expected market closures (CLOSED). Currently showing CLOSED state during daily maintenance window (17:00-18:00 ET).

minor.issue: Transient 502 error during test (server temporarily unavailable)
minor.note: Retry succeeded - not a persistent issue

passed_tests: ✅ Backend: GET /api/feed/health returns current state for MNQ and MES
✅ Backend: State includes 'state', 'reason', 'market' fields
✅ Backend: State is CLOSED during maintenance window (17:00-18:00 ET)
✅ Backend: Reason shows 'Manutencao diaria (17:00-18:00 ET)'
✅ Backend: GET /api/feed/health/report/MNQ?hours=1 returns report
✅ Backend: Report includes total_checks, uptime_pct, states, incidents, timeline
✅ Backend: Report shows 8 checks, 100% uptime, 0 incidents
✅ Backend: GET /api/feed/health/report/MES?hours=24 returns report
✅ Backend: /api/v3/signal/MNQ includes data_quality.feed_health
✅ Backend: feed_health in signal has state='CLOSED', reason='Manutencao diaria'
✅ MongoDB: feed_health_log collection has 16 documents
✅ MongoDB: Documents include symbol, state, reason, market_open, timestamp
✅ Frontend: Feed health indicator visible in chart HUD
✅ Frontend: Amber dot displayed for CLOSED state
✅ Frontend: Hover shows reason 'Manutencao diaria (17:00-18:00 ET)'
✅ Frontend: Auto-Tune page has 'Feed' tab
✅ Frontend: FeedHealthPanel displays current state (CLOSED)
✅ Frontend: KPIs show Uptime (100%), Checks (8), Mercado (0), Incidentes (0)
✅ Frontend: State distribution bar visible (all CLOSED)
✅ Frontend: Timeline visible with history
✅ Frontend: MNQ/MES symbol selector present
✅ Frontend: Period selector (6h/24h/3d/7d) present
critical_code_review_comments: FeedHealthMonitor correctly implements CME Globex schedule (Sun 18:00 ET → Fri 17:00 ET, daily halt 17-18 ET)
4 states properly defined: LIVE (green pulse), CLOSED (amber fixed), STALE (orange pulse), DEAD (red pulse)
is_cme_market_open() correctly handles weekends, daily maintenance, and normal trading hours
evaluate_feed_state() correctly evaluates feed health based on connection status and trade age
MongoDB persistence working - documents inserted every ~15-60s with state changes
Report endpoint correctly aggregates uptime_pct, state distribution, incidents, and timeline
Frontend DataBentoChart.jsx correctly displays feed health indicator in HUD (lines 567-596)
Frontend FeedHealthPanel correctly fetches and displays report data with KPIs and timeline

test_credentials.note: Used for API and Playwright tests

seed_data_creation: None - tests use live data from FeedHealthMonitor
context_for_next_testing_agent: Feed Health Monitor feature fully tested. Key components: (1) FeedHealthMonitor in /app/backend/services/feed_health.py - evaluates feed state every 15s and persists to MongoDB. (2) CME Globex schedule: Open Sun 18:00 ET → Fri 17:00 ET, daily halt 17-18 ET. (3) 4 states: LIVE (green pulse), CLOSED (amber fixed), STALE (orange pulse), DEAD (red pulse). (4) Endpoints: GET /api/feed/health (current state), GET /api/feed/health/report/{symbol}?hours=N (historical report). (5) Feed health included in /api/v3/signal response under data_quality.feed_health. (6) Frontend: indicator in chart HUD (DataBentoChart.jsx), FeedHealthPanel in Auto-Tune Feed tab (ReplayDashboard.jsx). Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_feed_health.py.

feature_verification.GET /api/feed/health: Working - returns MNQ and MES current state
feature_verification.GET /api/feed/health/report/{symbol}: Working - returns report with uptime_pct, states, incidents, timeline
feature_verification.CME Schedule Detection: Working - correctly shows CLOSED during maintenance (17:00-18:00 ET)
feature_verification.Chart HUD Indicator: Working - shows state with colored dot and reason on hover
feature_verification.FeedHealthPanel: Working - displays KPIs, distribution bar, timeline, symbol/period selectors

mocked_api_note: POST /api/signalstack/order is MOCKED (SignalStack webhook). All other endpoints use live data.
